subcodes.title: Doa Rawang
subcodes.first_line:
## Doa Rawang

(Doa Dayung Saan Bonon-eh)

O Topa, Topa ku! Itih dayung Ingan mogan Ingan, bisayak daang Ingan, nak jowi
subcodes.notes: Author: AB ('Abdu'l-Bahá). Bau Bidayuh healing prayer (section Doa Rawang, subsection Doa Dayung Sakit = Prayer for the Sick). Not found in inventory.
